metadata.description: Claude Code plugins for AI coding agents: OpenCode, Gemini, Claude, Codex, Cursor, Kilo

plugins.name: opencode
plugins.description: Delegate tasks and code reviews to OpenCode from Claude Code.

plugins.name: gemini
plugins.description: Delegate tasks and code reviews to Gemini CLI from Claude Code.

plugins.name: claude
plugins.description: Delegate tasks and code reviews to a second Claude Code instance.

plugins.name: codex
plugins.description: Delegate tasks and code reviews to Codex from Claude Code.

plugins.name: cursor
plugins.description: Delegate tasks and code reviews to Cursor Agent CLI from Claude Code.

plugins.name: kilo
plugins.description: Delegate tasks and code reviews to Kilo Code CLI from Claude Code.

plugins.name: chorus
plugins.description: Workflow patterns: LLM council, parallel review, parallel debug, second opinion.
